title: The National Rural Employment Guarantee (Extension to Jammu and Kashmir) Act, 2007
full_text: The National Rural Employment Guarantee (Extension to Jammu and Kashmir) Act, 2007 राष्‍ट्रीय ग्रामीण रोजगार गारंटी (जम्मू-कश्मीरपर विस्तार) अधिनियम, 2007 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 200723 Act Number: 23 Enactment Date: 2007-05-11 Act Year: 2007 Short Title: The National Rural Employment Guarantee (Extension to Jammu and Kashmir) Act, 2007 Hindi Title: राष्‍ट्रीय ग्रामीण रोजगार गारंटी (जम्मू-कश्मीरपर विस्तार) अधिनियम, 2007 Long Title: An Act to provide for the extension of the National Rural Employment Guarantee Act, 2005 to the State of Jammu and Kashmir. Ministry: Ministry of Rural Development Department: Department of Rural Development Enforcement Date: 04-06-2007 Notification: 4th June, 2007, vide notification no. S.O. 943(E), dated 6th June, 2007, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(ii). Extension and amendment of the National Rural Employment Guarantee Act, 2005. Section 3. Construction of reference to a law not in force in Jammu and Kashmir.
